title: Garth (disambiguation)
content:
'''Garth''' may refer to:

==Individuals==
*[[Garth (snake eater)|Garth]], a [[Snake/Legends|snake]] eater
*[[Garth (Senali)|Garth]]; a [[Senali (species)|Senali]] and the brother in law of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]
*[[Garth Breise]]; a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] stationed at the [[Extragalactic Society]] [[ExGal-4|station]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]
*[[Garth Ennis]]; a ''[[Star Wars]]'' author who wrote "[[Trooper (comic story)|Trooper]]" and "[[In the Beginning]]"
*[[Garth Ezzar]]; a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who served [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]

==Locations==
*[[Garth (city)|Garth]]; a city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]]

{{Disambig}}
